event_comments: Reviewed newsletter canonicalization follow-up 2026-03-21 merged duplicate event 100732c6-a15f-585f-9bd3-b4cfcabbf703 ("Riverside School, Chattaroy"). Reason: rollover duplicate. Notes: The November 1995 issue scheduled the Jan. 20 Riverside School event for 1996, not 1995, and the same event was later re-ingested from 1996-01.
